info.title: FoundryVTT WebSocket API
info.description: Client-facing WebSocket API for bidirectional communication with Foundry VTT through the relay server. Connect to /ws/api with a token and clientId to send requests and receive real-time events.

clientId.description: ID of the connected Foundry instance to target

message.name: json
message.summary: Get file system structure

path.description: The path to retrieve (relative to source)

source.description: The source directory to use (data, systems, modules, etc.)

recursive.description: Whether to recursively list all subdirectories

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: get-canvas-documents
message.summary: Get canvas embedded documents

documentType.description: Type of canvas document (tokens, tiles, drawings, lights, sounds, notes, templates, walls)

sceneId.description: Scene ID to query (defaults to the active scene)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: create-canvas-document
message.summary: Create canvas embedded document(s)

documentType.description: Type of canvas document (tokens, tiles, drawings, lights, sounds, notes, templates, walls)

sceneId.description: Scene ID to create in (defaults to the active scene)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: update-canvas-document
message.summary: Update a canvas embedded document

documentType.description: Type of canvas document (tokens, tiles, drawings, lights, sounds, notes, templates, walls)

documentId.description: ID of the document to update

data.description: Object containing the fields to update

sceneId.description: Scene ID containing the document (defaults to the active scene)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: delete-canvas-document
message.summary: Delete a canvas embedded document

documentType.description: Type of canvas document (tokens, tiles, drawings, lights, sounds, notes, templates, walls)

documentId.description: ID of the document to delete

sceneId.description: Scene ID containing the document (defaults to the active scene)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/chat-messages.description: Get chat messages Retrieves chat messages from the Foundry world with optional pagination and filtering.

message.name: chat-messages
message.summary: Get chat messages Retrieves chat messages from the Foundry world with optional pagination and filtering.

limit.description: Maximum number of messages to return (default: 10)

offset.description: Number of messages to skip for pagination

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

chatType.description: Foundry chat message type (0=OOC, 1=IC, 2=Emote, 3=Whisper, 4=Roll). Named chatType to avoid collision with WS message type field.

speaker.description: Filter messages by speaker name or actor ID

request/chat-send.description: Send a chat message Creates a new chat message in the Foundry world.

message.name: chat-send
message.summary: Send a chat message Creates a new chat message in the Foundry world.

whisper.description: Array of user IDs to whisper the message to

speaker.description: Actor ID to use as the message speaker

alias.description: Display name alias for the speaker

chatType.description: Foundry chat message type (0=OOC, 1=IC, 2=Emote, 3=Whisper, 4=Roll). Named chatType to avoid collision with WS message type field.

flavor.description: Flavor text displayed above the message content

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/chat-delete.description: Delete a specific chat message Deletes a chat message by its ID. Only the message author or a GM can delete messages.

message.name: chat-delete
message.summary: Delete a specific chat message Deletes a chat message by its ID. Only the message author or a GM can delete messages.

messageId.description: ID of the chat message to delete

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/chat-flush.description: Clear all chat messages Flushes all chat message history. Only GMs can perform this action.

message.name: chat-flush
message.summary: Clear all chat messages Flushes all chat message history. Only GMs can perform this action.

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/get-actor-details.description: Get detailed information for a specific D&D 5e actor. Retrieves comprehensive details about an actor including stats, inventory, spells, features, and other character information based on the requested details array.

message.name: get-actor-details
message.summary: Get detailed information for a specific D&D 5e actor. Retrieves comprehensive details about an actor including stats, inventory, spells, features, and other character information based on the requested details array.

details.description: Array of detail types to retrieve (e.g., ["resources", "items", "spells", "features"])

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/modify-item-charges.description: Modify the charges for a specific item owned by an actor. Increases or decreases the charges/uses of an item in an actor's inventory. Useful for consumable items like potions, scrolls, or charged magic items.

message.name: modify-item-charges
message.summary: Modify the charges for a specific item owned by an actor. Increases or decreases the charges/uses of an item in an actor's inventory. Useful for consumable items like potions, scrolls, or charged magic items.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor who owns the item

amount.description: The amount to modify charges by (positive or negative)

itemUuid.description: The UUID of the specific item (optional if itemName provided)

itemName.description: The name of the item if UUID not provided (optional if itemUuid provided)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/use-ability.description: Use a general ability for an actor. Triggers the use of any ability, feature, spell, or item for an actor. This is a generic endpoint that can handle various types of abilities.

message.name: use-ability
message.summary: Use a general ability for an actor. Triggers the use of any ability, feature, spell, or item for an actor. This is a generic endpoint that can handle various types of abilities.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor using the ability

abilityUuid.description: The UUID of the specific ability (optional if abilityName provided)

abilityName.description: The name of the ability if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

targetUuid.description: The UUID of the target for the ability (optional)

targetName.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/use-feature.description: Use a class or racial feature for an actor. Activates class features (like Action Surge, Rage) or racial features (like Dragonborn Breath Weapon) for a character.

message.name: use-feature
message.summary: Use a class or racial feature for an actor. Activates class features (like Action Surge, Rage) or racial features (like Dragonborn Breath Weapon) for a character.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor using the feature

abilityUuid.description: The UUID of the specific feature (optional if abilityName provided)

abilityName.description: The name of the feature if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

targetUuid.description: The UUID of the target for the feature (optional)

targetName.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/use-spell.description: Cast a spell for an actor. Casts a spell from the actor's spell list, consuming spell slots as appropriate. Handles cantrips, leveled spells, and spell-like abilities.

message.name: use-spell
message.summary: Cast a spell for an actor. Casts a spell from the actor's spell list, consuming spell slots as appropriate. Handles cantrips, leveled spells, and spell-like abilities.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor casting the spell

abilityUuid.description: The UUID of the specific spell (optional if abilityName provided)

abilityName.description: The name of the spell if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

targetUuid.description: The UUID of the target for the spell (optional)

targetName.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/use-item.description: Use an item for an actor. Activates an item from the actor's inventory, such as drinking a potion, using a magic item, or activating equipment with special properties.

message.name: use-item
message.summary: Use an item for an actor. Activates an item from the actor's inventory, such as drinking a potion, using a magic item, or activating equipment with special properties.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor using the item

abilityUuid.description: The UUID of the specific item (optional if abilityName provided)

abilityName.description: The name of the item if UUID not provided (optional if abilityUuid provided)

targetUuid.description: The UUID of the target for the item (optional)

targetName.description: The name of the target if UUID not provided (optional)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/short-rest.description: Perform a short rest for an actor. Triggers the D&D 5e short rest workflow including hit dice recovery, class feature resets, and HP recovery.

message.name: short-rest
message.summary: Perform a short rest for an actor. Triggers the D&D 5e short rest workflow including hit dice recovery, class feature resets, and HP recovery.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor to rest (optional if selected is true)

selected.description: Use the currently selected token's actor

autoHD.description: Automatically spend hit dice during short rest

autoHDThreshold.description: HP threshold below which to auto-spend hit dice (0-1 as fraction of max HP)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/long-rest.description: Perform a long rest for an actor. Triggers the D&D 5e long rest workflow including full HP recovery, spell slot restoration, hit dice recovery, and feature resets.

message.name: long-rest
message.summary: Perform a long rest for an actor. Triggers the D&D 5e long rest workflow including full HP recovery, spell slot restoration, hit dice recovery, and feature resets.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor to rest (optional if selected is true)

selected.description: Use the currently selected token's actor

newDay.description: Whether the long rest marks a new day (default: true)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/skill-check.description: Roll a skill check for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e skill check with all applicable modifiers including proficiency, expertise, Jack of All Trades, and conditional bonuses.

message.name: skill-check
message.summary: Roll a skill check for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e skill check with all applicable modifiers including proficiency, expertise, Jack of All Trades, and conditional bonuses.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor rolling the check

createChatMessage.description: Whether to post the roll to chat (default: true)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/ability-save.description: Roll an ability saving throw for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e ability saving throw with all applicable modifiers.

message.name: ability-save
message.summary: Roll an ability saving throw for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e ability saving throw with all applicable modifiers.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor rolling the save

createChatMessage.description: Whether to post the roll to chat (default: true)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/ability-check.description: Roll an ability check for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e ability check (raw ability test, not a skill check) with all applicable modifiers.

message.name: ability-check
message.summary: Roll an ability check for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e ability check (raw ability test, not a skill check) with all applicable modifiers.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor rolling the check

createChatMessage.description: Whether to post the roll to chat (default: true)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/death-save.description: Roll a death saving throw for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e death saving throw, handling DC 10 CON save, three successes/failures tracking, nat 20 healing, and nat 1 double failure.

message.name: death-save
message.summary: Roll a death saving throw for an actor. Rolls a D&D 5e death saving throw, handling DC 10 CON save, three successes/failures tracking, nat 20 healing, and nat 1 double failure.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor rolling the death save

createChatMessage.description: Whether to post the roll to chat (default: true)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/modify-experience.description: Modify the experience points for a specific actor. Adds or removes experience points from an actor.

message.name: modify-experience
message.summary: Modify the experience points for a specific actor. Adds or removes experience points from an actor.

amount.description: The amount of experience to add (can be negative)

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor to modify

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/get-effects.description: Get all active effects on an actor or token. Returns the collection of ActiveEffect documents currently applied to the specified actor or token.

message.name: get-effects
message.summary: Get all active effects on an actor or token. Returns the collection of ActiveEffect documents currently applied to the specified actor or token.

uuid.description: UUID of the actor or token to query

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/add-effect.description: Add an active effect to an actor or token. Adds a status condition (by statusId) or a custom ActiveEffect (via effectData) to the specified actor or token.

message.name: add-effect
message.summary: Add an active effect to an actor or token. Adds a status condition (by statusId) or a custom ActiveEffect (via effectData) to the specified actor or token.

uuid.description: UUID of the actor or token to add the effect to

effectData.description: Custom ActiveEffect data object (name, icon, duration, changes)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/remove-effect.description: Remove an active effect from an actor or token. Removes an effect by its document ID (effectId) or by status condition identifier (statusId).

message.name: remove-effect
message.summary: Remove an active effect from an actor or token. Removes an effect by its document ID (effectId) or by status condition identifier (statusId).

uuid.description: UUID of the actor or token to remove the effect from

effectId.description: The ActiveEffect document ID to remove

statusId.description: Standard status condition ID to remove (e.g., "poisoned")

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/encounters.description: Get all active encounters Retrieves a list of all currently active encounters in the Foundry world.

message.name: encounters
message.summary: Get all active encounters Retrieves a list of all currently active encounters in the Foundry world.

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/start-encounter.description: Start a new encounter Initiates a new encounter in the Foundry world.

message.name: start-encounter
message.summary: Start a new encounter Initiates a new encounter in the Foundry world.

tokens.description: Array of token UUIDs to include in the encounter

startWithSelected.description: Whether to start with selected tokens

rollAll.description: Whether to roll for all tokens

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/next-turn.description: Advance to the next turn in the encounter Moves the encounter to the next turn.

message.name: next-turn
message.summary: Advance to the next turn in the encounter Moves the encounter to the next turn.

encounter.description: The ID of the encounter to advance (optional, defaults to current encounter)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/next-round.description: Advance to the next round in the encounter Moves the encounter to the next round.

message.name: next-round
message.summary: Advance to the next round in the encounter Moves the encounter to the next round.

encounter.description: The ID of the encounter to advance (optional, defaults to current encounter)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/last-turn.description: Advance to the last turn in the encounter Moves the encounter to the last turn.

message.name: last-turn
message.summary: Advance to the last turn in the encounter Moves the encounter to the last turn.

encounter.description: The ID of the encounter to advance (optional, defaults to current encounter)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/last-round.description: Advance to the last round in the encounter Moves the encounter to the last round.

message.name: last-round
message.summary: Advance to the last round in the encounter Moves the encounter to the last round.

encounter.description: The ID of the encounter to advance (optional, defaults to current encounter)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/end-encounter.description: End an encounter Ends the current encounter in the Foundry world.

message.name: end-encounter
message.summary: End an encounter Ends the current encounter in the Foundry world.

encounter.description: The ID of the encounter to end (optional, defaults to current encounter)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/add-to-encounter.description: Add tokens to an encounter Adds selected tokens or specified UUIDs to the current encounter.

message.name: add-to-encounter
message.summary: Add tokens to an encounter Adds selected tokens or specified UUIDs to the current encounter.

encounter.description: The ID of the encounter to add tokens to (optional, defaults to current encounter)

selected.description: Whether to add selected tokens (optional, defaults to false)

uuids.description: The UUIDs of the tokens to add (optional, defaults to empty array)

rollInitiative.description: Whether to roll initiative for the added tokens (optional, defaults to false)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/remove-from-encounter.description: Remove tokens from an encounter Removes selected tokens or specified UUIDs from the current encounter.

message.name: remove-from-encounter
message.summary: Remove tokens from an encounter Removes selected tokens or specified UUIDs from the current encounter.

encounter.description: The ID of the encounter to remove tokens from (optional, defaults to current encounter)

selected.description: Whether to remove selected tokens (optional, defaults to false)

uuids.description: The UUIDs of the tokens to remove (optional, defaults to empty array)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/entity.description: Get entity details This endpoint retrieves the details of a specific entity.

message.name: entity
message.summary: Get entity details This endpoint retrieves the details of a specific entity.

uuid.description: UUID of the entity to retrieve (optional if selected=true)

selected.description: Whether to get the selected entity

actor.description: Return the actor of specified entity

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/create.description: Create a new entity This endpoint creates a new entity in the Foundry world.

message.name: create
message.summary: Create a new entity This endpoint creates a new entity in the Foundry world.

entityType.description: Document type of entity to create (Scene, Actor, Item, JournalEntry, RollTable, Cards, Macro, Playlist, ext.)

folder.description: Optional folder UUID to place the new entity in

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/update.description: Update an existing entity This endpoint updates an existing entity in the Foundry world.

message.name: update
message.summary: Update an existing entity This endpoint updates an existing entity in the Foundry world.

data.description: Data to update the entity with

uuid.description: UUID of the entity to update (optional if selected=true)

selected.description: Whether to update the selected entity

actor.description: Update the actor of selected entity when selected=true

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/delete.description: Delete an entity This endpoint deletes an entity from the Foundry world.

message.name: delete
message.summary: Delete an entity This endpoint deletes an entity from the Foundry world.

uuid.description: UUID of the entity to delete (optional if selected=true)

selected.description: Whether to delete the selected entity

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/give.description: Give an item to an entity This endpoint gives an item to a specified entity. Optionally, removes the item from the giver.

message.name: give
message.summary: Give an item to an entity This endpoint gives an item to a specified entity. Optionally, removes the item from the giver.

fromUuid.description: UUID of the entity giving the item

toUuid.description: UUID of the entity receiving the item

selected.description: Whether to give to the selected token's actor

itemUuid.description: UUID of the item to give (optional if itemName provided)

itemName.description: Name of the item to give (search with Quick Insert if UUID not provided)

quantity.description: Quantity of the item to give (negative values decrease quantity to 0)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/remove.description: Remove an item from an entity This endpoint removes an item from a specified entity.

message.name: remove
message.summary: Remove an item from an entity This endpoint removes an item from a specified entity.

actorUuid.description: UUID of the actor to remove the item from (optional if selected=true)

selected.description: Whether to remove from the selected token's actor

itemUuid.description: UUID of the item to remove

itemName.description: Name of the item to remove (search with Quick Insert if UUID not provided)

quantity.description: Quantity of the item to remove

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/decrease.description: Decrease an attribute This endpoint decreases an attribute of a specified entity.

message.name: decrease
message.summary: Decrease an attribute This endpoint decreases an attribute of a specified entity.

attribute.description: The attribute data path to decrease (e.g., "system.attributes.hp.value")

amount.description: The amount to decrease the attribute by

uuid.description: UUID of the entity to decrease the attribute for (optional if selected=true)

selected.description: Whether to decrease the attribute for the selected entity

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/increase.description: Increase an attribute This endpoint increases an attribute of a specified entity.

message.name: increase
message.summary: Increase an attribute This endpoint increases an attribute of a specified entity.

attribute.description: The attribute data path to increase (e.g., "system.attributes.hp.value")

amount.description: The amount to increase the attribute by

uuid.description: UUID of the entity to increase the attribute for (optional if selected=true)

selected.description: Whether to increase the attribute for the selected entity

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/kill.description: Kill an entity Marks an entity as killed in the combat tracker, gives it the "dead" status, and sets its health to 0 in the Foundry world.

message.name: kill
message.summary: Kill an entity Marks an entity as killed in the combat tracker, gives it the "dead" status, and sets its health to 0 in the Foundry world.

uuid.description: UUID of the entity to kill (optional if selected=true)

selected.description: Whether to kill the selected entity

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/macros.description: Get all macros Retrieves a list of all macros available in the Foundry world.

message.name: macros
message.summary: Get all macros Retrieves a list of all macros available in the Foundry world.

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/macro-execute.description: Execute a macro by UUID Executes a specific macro in the Foundry world by its UUID.

message.name: macro-execute
message.summary: Execute a macro by UUID Executes a specific macro in the Foundry world by its UUID.

uuid.description: UUID of the macro to execute

args.description: Optional arguments to pass to the macro execution

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/rolls.description: Get recent rolls Retrieves a list of up to 20 recent rolls made in the Foundry world.

message.name: rolls
message.summary: Get recent rolls Retrieves a list of up to 20 recent rolls made in the Foundry world.

limit.description: Optional limit on the number of rolls to return (default is 20)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/last-roll.description: Get the last roll Retrieves the most recent roll made in the Foundry world.

message.name: last-roll
message.summary: Get the last roll Retrieves the most recent roll made in the Foundry world.

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/roll.description: Make a roll Executes a roll with the specified formula

message.name: roll
message.summary: Make a roll Executes a roll with the specified formula

flavor.description: Optional flavor text for the roll

createChatMessage.description: Whether to create a chat message for the roll

whisper.description: Users to whisper the roll result to

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/get-scene.description: Get scene(s) Retrieves one or more scenes by ID, name, active status, viewed status, or all.

message.name: get-scene
message.summary: Get scene(s) Retrieves one or more scenes by ID, name, active status, viewed status, or all.

sceneId.description: ID of a specific scene to retrieve

name.description: Name of the scene to retrieve

active.description: Set to true to get the currently active scene

viewed.description: Set to true to get the currently viewed scene

all.description: Set to true to get all scenes

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: create-scene
message.summary: Create a new scene

data.description: Scene data object (name, width, height, grid, etc.)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: update-scene
message.summary: Update an existing scene

data.description: Object containing the scene fields to update

sceneId.description: ID of the scene to update

name.description: Name of the scene to update (alternative to sceneId)

active.description: Set to true to target the active scene

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: delete-scene
message.summary: Delete a scene

sceneId.description: ID of the scene to delete

name.description: Name of the scene to delete (alternative to sceneId)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: switch-scene
message.summary: Switch the active scene

sceneId.description: ID of the scene to activate

name.description: Name of the scene to activate (alternative to sceneId)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/search.description: Search entities This endpoint allows searching for entities in the Foundry world based on a query string. Requires Quick Insert module to be installed and enabled.

message.name: search
message.summary: Search entities This endpoint allows searching for entities in the Foundry world based on a query string. Requires Quick Insert module to be installed and enabled.

filter.description: Filter to apply (simple: filter="Actor", property-based: filter="key:value,key2:value2")

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/structure.description: Get the structure of the Foundry world Retrieves the folder and compendium structure for the specified Foundry world.

message.name: structure
message.summary: Get the structure of the Foundry world Retrieves the folder and compendium structure for the specified Foundry world.

includeEntityData.description: Whether to include full entity data or just UUIDs and names

path.description: Path to read structure from (null = root)

recursive.description: Whether to read down the folder tree

types.description: Types to return (Scene/Actor/Item/JournalEntry/RollTable/Cards/Macro/Playlist), can be comma-separated or JSON array

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/get-folder.description: Get a specific folder by name

message.name: get-folder
message.summary: Get a specific folder by name

name.description: Name of the folder to retrieve

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: create-folder
message.summary: Create a new folder

folderType.description: Type of folder (Scene, Actor, Item, JournalEntry, RollTable, Cards, Macro, Playlist)

parentFolderId.description: ID of the parent folder (optional for root level)

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

message.name: delete-folder
message.summary: Delete a folder

folderId.description: ID of the folder to delete

deleteAll.description: Whether to delete all entities in the folder

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/select.description: Select token(s) Selects one or more tokens in the Foundry VTT client.

message.name: select
message.summary: Select token(s) Selects one or more tokens in the Foundry VTT client.

name.description: Name of the token(s) to select

all.description: Whether to select all tokens on the canvas

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/selected.description: Get selected token(s) Retrieves the currently selected token(s) in the Foundry VTT client.

message.name: selected
message.summary: Get selected token(s) Retrieves the currently selected token(s) in the Foundry VTT client.

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/players.description: Get players/users Retrieves a list of all users configured in the Foundry VTT world. Useful for discovering valid userId values for permission-scoped API calls.

message.name: players
message.summary: Get players/users Retrieves a list of all users configured in the Foundry VTT world. Useful for discovering valid userId values for permission-scoped API calls.

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

request/execute-js.description: Execute JavaScript Executes a JavaScript script in the Foundry VTT client.

message.name: execute-js
message.summary: Execute JavaScript Executes a JavaScript script in the Foundry VTT client.

userId.description: Foundry user ID or username to scope permissions (omit for GM-level access)

events/chat.description: Real-time chat message events from Foundry. Subscribe with { type: "subscribe", channel: "chat-events" }.

events/roll.description: Real-time dice roll events from Foundry. Subscribe with { type: "subscribe", channel: "roll-events" }.

userId.description: Filter by Foundry user ID or username

channel.description: Omit to unsubscribe from all channels
